theorem: and_intro (P Q : Prop) (hp : P) (hq : Q) : P ∧ Q

steps.label: Split the conjunction into two subgoals
steps.explanation: The goal P ∧ Q is a structure with two fields. constructor asks us to provide each: first a proof of P, then a proof of Q. One goal becomes two.

strategy.rule: To prove A ∧ B, prove A and prove B separately

steps.label: First subgoal: prove P
steps.explanation: We have hp : P in context. The goal is P. Exact match.

steps.label: Second subgoal: prove Q
steps.explanation: We have hq : Q in context. The goal is Q. Done!
